[Falaq_Rasmli (3).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28440161/Falaq_Rasmli.3.html)
# falaq-zak<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="uz">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1">
<title>Falaq Nashriyoti</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#EEF2F7;padding-bottom:200px}
.hdr{background:#1F3864;color:#fff;padding:12px 14px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:200}
.htitle{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px}
.pw{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.13);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px}
.pl{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:5px;opacity:.9}
.steps{display:flex;gap:2px}
.step{flex:1;text-align:center;padding:4px 2px;border-radius:6px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;border:2px solid transparent;transition:all .3s}
.step.on{border-color:#FFD700;transform:scale(1.08)}
.s0{background:#4a4a4a;color:#ccc}
.s1{background:#B8860B;color:#fff}
.s2{background:#8B4500;color:#fff}
.s3{background:#1A5C8A;color:#fff}
.s4{background:#1E6B3A;color:#fff}
.pbw{height:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:5px;margin-top:5px;overflow:hidden}
.pb{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#FFD700,#FF8C00);border-radius:5px;transition:width .4s;width:0}
.ptxt{font-size:10px;margin-top:4px;opacity:.85}
.fbox{background:#fff;margin:8px;border-radius:10px;padding:12px}
.ftitle{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1F3864;margin-bottom:7px}
.fgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px}
.inp{padding:7px 9px;border:1.5px solid #ddd;border-radius:7px;font-size:12px;width:100%;outline:none}
.inp:focus{border-color:#2E75B6}
.fltrow{display:flex;gap:6px;padding:6px 8px}
.fb{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;border:1.5px solid #ccc;background:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer}
.fb.on{background:#1F3864;color:#fff;border-color:#1F3864}
.sec{margin:6px 8px 4px;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;text-align:center}
.ds{background:#2E7D32}.bs{background:#1565C0}
.card{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;margin:0 8px 8px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.07);border:2px solid transparent}
.card.sel{border-color:#2E75B6}
.ctop{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:10px}
.bimg{width:72px;height:96px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid #e0e0e0}
.binfo{flex:1;min-width:0}
.bname{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#111;margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.3}
.bdg{display:inline-block;font-size:9px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:3px}
.dbd{background:#E8F5E9;color:#2E6B2E}.bbd{background:#E3F2FD;color:#1A4A7A}
.boram{font-size:11px;color:#888;margin-bottom:3px}
.basl{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1F3864}
.sold{text-decoration:line-through;color:#bbb;font-size:11px;font-weight:400}
.ntbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}
.ntbl th,.ntbl td{padding:5px 4px;text-align:center}
.ntbl th{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#fff}
.hl td{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2px #FFD700}
.th0{background:#555}.th1{background:#B8860B}.th2{background:#8B4500}.th3{background:#1A5C8A}.th4{background:#1E6B3A}
.td0{background:#F5F5F5;color:#333;font-weight:600}
.td1{background:#FFF8DC;color:#7B5800;font-weight:700}
.td2{background:#FFE0C0;color:#5C2D00;font-weight:700}
.td3{background:#D0EAFF;color:#0D3A5C;font-weight:700}
.td4{background:#D0F0DC;color:#0D3D20;font-weight:700}
.zsec{border-top:1px solid #f0f0f0;padding:8px 10px;background:#FAFAFA}
.mbtns{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:7px}
.mbtn{flex:1;padding:6px 4px;border-radius:7px;border:1.5px solid #ddd;background:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;color:#555}
.mbtn.on{background:#1F3864;color:#fff;border-color:#1F3864}
.qrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px}
.qlbl{font-size:11px;color:#555;flex:1;line-height:1.3}
.qctrl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.qb{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #2E75B6;background:#fff;color:#2E75B6;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.qb:active{background:#2E75B6;color:#fff}
.qnum{width:36px;text-align:center;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#1F3864}
.zsrow{background:#EAF4FF;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 10px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.zsl{font-size:11px;color:#444}.zsv{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1565C0}
.tbar{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:#fff;border-top:2px solid #ddd;padding:9px 12px;z-index:300;box-shadow:0 -3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
.tcells{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:4px;margin-bottom:6px}
.tc{text-align:center;background:#F0F4FA;border-radius:7px;padding:5px 2px}
.tcl{font-size:9px;color:#888}.tcv{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1F3864}
.dinfo{background:#FFF8DC;border-radius:7px;padding:5px 10px;margin-bottom:5px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:11px}
.dl{color:#7B5800;font-weight:700}.dr{color:#2E7D32;font-weight:700}
.sbtn{width:100%;padding:11px;background:#1F3864;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}
.cbtn{width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:6px;background:#fff;color:#aaa;border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="hdr">
  <div class="htitle">Falaq Nashriyoti - Zakaz</div>
  <div class="pw">
    <div class="pl">Chegirma darajangiz (zakaz summasiga qarab avtomatik):</div>
    <div class="steps">
      <div class="step s0" id="st0"><div>0%</div><div style="font-size:8px">&lt;5M</div></div>
      <div class="step s1" id="st1"><div>3%</div><div style="font-size:8px">5-10M</div></div>
      <div class="step s2" id="st2"><div>5%</div><div style="font-size:8px">10-25M</div></div>
      <div class="step s3" id="st3"><div>7%</div><div style="font-size:8px">25-50M</div></div>
      <div class="step s4" id="st4"><div>9%</div><div style="font-size:8px">50M+</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pbw"><div class="pb" id="pb"></div></div>
    <div class="ptxt" id="ptxt">Zakaz qiling - chegirma avtomatik!</div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="fbox">
  <div class="ftitle">Dokon malumotlari</div>
  <div class="fgrid">
    <input class="inp" id="fi" placeholder="Ismingiz">
    <input class="inp" id="ft" placeholder="Telefon" type="tel">
    <input class="inp" id="fs" placeholder="Shahar">
    <input class="inp" id="fd" placeholder="Dokon nomi">
  </div>
</div>
<div class="fltrow">
  <button class="fb on" onclick="flt(this,0)">Hammasi</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="flt(this,1)">Diniy</button>
  <button class="fb" onclick="flt(this,2)">Badiiy</button>
</div>
<div id="list"></div>
<div class="tbar">
  <div class="tcells">
    <div class="tc"><div class="tcl">Tur</div><div class="tcv" id="tt">0 ta</div></div>
    <div class="tc"><div class="tcl">Dona</div><div class="tcv" id="td">0</div></div>
    <div class="tc"><div class="tcl">Summa</div><div class="tcv" id="ts">0</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="dinfo" id="dbi" style="display:none">
    <span class="dl" id="dbl">Chegirma!</span>
    <span class="dr" id="dbr"></span>
  </div>
  <button class="sbtn" onclick="send()">Zakazni Telegramga yuborish</button>
  <button class="cbtn" onclick="clr()">Tozalash</button>
</div>
<script>
var B=[{"n": "Qulog'im senda, qizim!", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 60000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Habibimiz oramizda bo'lsalar", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 39000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Qur'ondan maktublar", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 60000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Sahobalardan maktublar", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 65000, "img": ""}, {"n": "O'rgatding Allohim", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 55000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Ishonchli xabar", "t": "Badiiy", "o": 20, "p": 60000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Qalbi singanlarga", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 49000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Yosh qizga nasihat", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 35000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Farzand tarbiyasida 700 saboq (1-qism)", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 39000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Farzand tarbiyasida 700 saboq (2-qism)", "t": "Diniy", "o": 30, "p": 39000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Farzand mas'uliyatini oshirishda 100 tavsiya", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 35000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Islomda yoshlar tarbiyasi", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 21000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Payg'ambar izidan", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 0, "img": ""}, {"n": "Kechir Allohim", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 24000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Solih va solihalardan nasihatlar (1-qism)", "t": "Diniy", "o": 50, "p": 25000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Solih va solihalardan nasihatlar (2-qism)", "t": "Diniy", "o": 50, "p": 25000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Solihlar hayotidan", "t": "Diniy", "o": 16, "p": 34000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Omonat", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 30000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Ikki qariya", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 28000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Mehr oyi", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 21000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Labbay Allohim, labbay", "t": "Diniy", "o": 60, "p": 18000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Alloh sari 20 bekat", "t": "Diniy", "o": 24, "p": 36000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Boshlang'ich arab tili alifbosi", "t": "Diniy", "o": 50, "p": 15000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Sehrlangan g'or", "t": "Badiiy", "o": 80, "p": 22000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Foten", "t": "Badiiy", "o": 20, "p": 35000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Og'riqlardan saboqlar", "t": "Badiiy", "o": 24, "p": 40000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Enteresta", "t": "Badiiy", "o": 20, "p": 55000, "img": ""}, {"n": "La'natlangan qiz", "t": "Badiiy", "o": 20, "p": 50000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Fotimaning bolasi", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 40000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Shaxmat ustidagi qotillik", "t": "Badiiy", "o": 20, "p": 50000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Metin qoyalar", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 70000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Oqshom go'zaliklari", "t": "Diniy", "o": 16, "p": 75000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Binafsha shu'lasi", "t": "Badiiy", "o": 20, "p": 60000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Boy bo'lishni istasangiz...", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 55000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Bolamning o'qigisi yo'q", "t": "Diniy", "o": 40, "p": 40000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Er-xotinga nasihat", "t": "Diniy", "o": 10, "p": 95000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Yangi nafas", "t": "Diniy", "o": 60, "p": 27000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Jannat bo'stonidagi oilaviy oqshomlar", "t": "Diniy", "o": 10, "p": 86000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Farzand tarbiyasida 700 saboq (3-qism)", "t": "Diniy", "o": 30, "p": 55000, "img": ""}, {"n": "Yosh yigitga nasihat", "t": "Diniy", "o": 20, "p": 58000, "img": ""}];
var qty={},mode={};
B.forEach(function(b,i){qty[i]=0;mode[i]=0;});
var cf=0;
function ff(n){return n.toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g," ");}
function dc(p,pct){return Math.round(p*(1-pct/100));}
function getPct(t){if(t>=50000000)return 9;if(t>=25000000)return 7;if(t>=10000000)return 5;if(t>=5000000)return 3;return 0;}
function getTotal(){var s=0;B.forEach(function(b,i){if(qty[i]>0){var d=mode[i]===1?qty[i]*b.o:qty[i];s+=d*b.p;}});return s;}
function getDiscTotal(pct){var s=0;B.forEach(function(b,i){if(qty[i]>0){var d=mode[i]===1?qty[i]*b.o:qty[i];s+=d*(pct>0?dc(b.p,pct):b.p);}});return s;}
function flt(el,f){cf=f;document.querySelectorAll(".fb").forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove("on");});el.classList.add("on");render();}
function render(){
  var list=document.getElementById("list");list.innerHTML="";
  var t=getTotal(),pct=getPct(t);
  if(cf===0||cf===1){var ds=document.createElement("div");ds.className="sec ds";ds.textContent="DINIY KITOBLAR";list.appendChild(ds);B.forEach(function(b,i){if(b.t==="Diniy")list.appendChild(mkCard(b,i,pct));});}
  if(cf===0||cf===2){var bs=document.createElement("div");bs.className="sec bs";bs.textContent="BADIIY KITOBLAR";list.appendChild(bs);B.forEach(function(b,i){if(b.t==="Badiiy")list.appendChild(mkCard(b,i,pct));});}
  updTotal();
}
function mkCard(b,i,pct){
  var p=b.p,o=b.o,q=qty[i],m=mode[i];
  var actP=pct>0?dc(p,pct):p;
  var dona=m===1?q*o:q;
  var sum=dona*actP;
  var card=document.createElement("div");
  card.className="card"+(q>0?" sel":"");
  card.id="c"+i;
  var imgH="<img class=\"bimg\" src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,"+b.img+"\" alt=\""+b.n+"\">";
  var aslH=pct>0?"<span style=\"font-weight:700;color:#1F3864\">"+ff(actP)+" som</span> <span class=\"sold\">"+ff(p)+"</span>":ff(p)+" som";
  var hi=pct===3?1:pct===5?2:pct===7?3:pct===9?4:0;
  var rows=[["Asl narx","td0",p,p*o],["3% (5-10M)","td1",dc(p,3),dc(p,3)*o],["5% (10-25M)","td2",dc(p,5),dc(p,5)*o],["7% (25-50M)","td3",dc(p,7),dc(p,7)*o],["9% (50M+)","td4",dc(p,9),dc(p,9)*o]];
  var trows="<tr><th class=\"th0\">Narx turi</th><th class=\"th0\">1 dona</th><th class=\"th0\">1 pochka ("+o+")</th></tr>";
  rows.forEach(function(r,ri){var hl=ri===hi&&pct>0?" class=\"hl\"":"";trows+="<tr"+hl+"><td class=\""+r[1]+"\">"+r[0]+"</td><td class=\""+r[1]+"\">"+ff(r[2])+"</td><td class=\""+r[1]+"\">"+ff(r[3])+"</td></tr>";});
  var qlbl=m===1?"Necha pochka? (1 pochka = "+o+" dona)":"Necha dona:";
  var zsL=dona>0?(dona+" dona"+(pct>0?" - "+pct+"% chegirma":"")):"0 dona";
  card.innerHTML=
    "<div class=\"ctop\">"+imgH+"<div class=\"binfo\"><div class=\"bname\">"+b.n+"</div><span class=\"bdg "+(b.t==="Diniy"?"dbd":"bbd")+"\">"+b.t+"</span><div class=\"boram\">Oramda: <b>"+o+" dona</b></div><div class=\"basl\">"+aslH+"</div></div></div>"+
    "<div style=\"padding:0 8px 6px;overflow-x:auto\"><table class=\"ntbl\">"+trows+"</table></div>"+
    "<div class=\"zsec\"><div class=\"mbtns\"><button class=\"mbtn"+(m===0?" on":"")+"\" onclick=\"setM("+i+",0)\">Dona soni</button><button class=\"mbtn"+(m===1?" on":"")+"\" onclick=\"setM("+i+",1)\">Pochka soni</button></div>"+
    "<div class=\"qrow\"><span class=\"qlbl\">"+qlbl+"</span><div class=\"qctrl\"><button class=\"qb\" onclick=\"chQ("+i+",-1)\">-</button><span class=\"qnum\" id=\"qn"+i+"\">"+q+"</span><button class=\"qb\" onclick=\"chQ("+i+",1)\">+</button></div></div>"+
    "<div class=\"zsrow\"><span class=\"zsl\">"+zsL+":</span><span class=\"zsv\" id=\"zs"+i+"\">"+(dona>0?ff(sum)+" som":"--")+"</span></div></div>";
  return card;
}
function setM(i,m){mode[i]=m;qty[i]=0;reR(i);updTotal();}
function chQ(i,d){qty[i]=Math.max(0,qty[i]+d);reR(i);updTotal();}
function reR(i){var t=getTotal(),pct=getPct(t);var old=document.getElementById("c"+i);if(old){var nc=mkCard(B[i],i,pct);old.parentNode.replaceChild(nc,old);}}
function updTotal(){
  var t=getTotal(),pct=getPct(t);var dona=0,tur=0;
  B.forEach(function(b,i){var q=qty[i]||0;if(q>0){tur++;dona+=mode[i]===1?q*b.o:q;}});
  document.getElementById("ts").textContent=ff(t)+" som";
  document.getElementById("td").textContent=dona;
  document.getElementById("tt").textContent=tur+" ta";
  ["st0","st1","st2","st3","st4"].forEach(function(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove("on");});
  var bp=0,nxt=5000000,nxtP=3;
  if(t>=50000000){bp=100;document.getElementById("st4").classList.add("on");nxt=0;nxtP=9;}
  else if(t>=25000000){bp=75+(t-25000000)/25000000*25;document.getElementById("st3").classList.add("on");nxt=50000000-t;nxtP=9;}
  else if(t>=10000000){bp=50+(t-10000000)/15000000*25;document.getElementById("st2").classList.add("on");nxt=25000000-t;nxtP=7;}
  else if(t>=5000000){bp=25+(t-5000000)/5000000*25;document.getElementById("st1").classList.add("on");nxt=10000000-t;nxtP=5;}
  else{bp=t/5000000*25;document.getElementById("st0").classList.add("on");nxt=5000000-t;nxtP=3;}
  document.getElementById("pb").style.width=Math.min(100,bp)+"%";
  if(pct>0){
    document.getElementById("ptxt").textContent=pct+"% chegirma! Yana "+ff(nxt)+" som - "+nxtP+"% boladi";
    var saved=t-getDiscTotal(pct);
    document.getElementById("dbi").style.display="flex";
    document.getElementById("dbl").textContent=pct+"% chegirma qollanmoqda!";
    document.getElementById("dbr").textContent="Tejash: "+ff(saved)+" som";
  }else{
    document.getElementById("ptxt").textContent="5 000 000 som - 3% chegirma!";
    document.getElementById("dbi").style.display="none";
  }
}
function clr(){if(!confirm("Tozalaysizmi?"))return;B.forEach(function(b,i){qty[i]=0;mode[i]=0;});render();}
function send(){
  var t=getTotal(),pct=getPct(t);
  var ism=document.getElementById("fi").value||"-";
  var tel=document.getElementById("ft").value||"-";
  var sh=document.getElementById("fs").value||"-";
  var dk=document.getElementById("fd").value||"-";
  var lines=["FALAQ NASHRIYOTI - ZAKAZ","","Ism: "+ism+" | Tel: "+tel,"Shahar: "+sh+" | Dokon: "+dk];
  if(pct>0)lines.push("Chegirma: "+pct+"%");
  lines.push("","ZAKAZ:");
  var has=false,actTotal=0;
  B.forEach(function(b,i){
    var q=qty[i]||0;if(q>0){has=true;var dona=mode[i]===1?q*b.o:q;var ap=pct>0?dc(b.p,pct):b.p;actTotal+=dona*ap;
    lines.push("- "+b.n+": "+dona+" dona x "+ff(ap)+" = "+ff(dona*ap)+" som"+(mode[i]===1?" ("+q+" pochka)":""));}
  });
  if(!has){alert("Hech narsa tanlanmadi!");return;}
  lines.push("","JAMI: "+ff(actTotal)+" som"+(pct>0?" ("+pct+"% chegirma bilan)":""));
  lines.push("Sana: "+new Date().toLocaleDateString());
  window.open("https://t.me/share/url?url=&text="+encodeURIComponent(lines.join("\n")),"_blank");
}
render();
</script>
</body>
</html>az
